arts.ttl: Al-Nassr deny Jhon Duran CONTROVERSY just days after Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Jhon Duran was the Saudi Pro League’s major arrival during the winter transfer window, with the Colombia international captured in a spectacular €77 million deal by Al-Nassr from Aston Villa . His transfer was rapidly followed by claims that he is travelling more than 600 miles per day to commute to training in order to avoid living in Saudi Arabia.
